Week 9

2026-02-27

Chromagrams and cepstrograms

For the assignment of this week I chose two songs which are in my corpus and are among my favorite songs. In the following I will show the chromagrams and cepstrograms of these two songs.

Across both songs the timbre-based self-similarity matrices show clearer sectional boundaries (stronger lines or blocks), while the chroma-based matrices better capture harmonic repetition but with generally softer boundaries, especially in Brain Damage.
